task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Moodle interface with the 'Introduction to Biology' or 'BIO101' course page open.

task_completion.description: Initiate the creation of a 'Page' resource.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Adding a new Page' screen in Moodle. It must explicitly be a 'Page' resource, not a 'URL' resource.

task_completion.description: Set the name of the resource to 'Supplementary Video: Cell Theory'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Name' text field contains exactly 'Supplementary Video: Cell Theory', or the final created page displays this as its title.

task_completion.description: Include the required instructional text in the page content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Page content' (not Description) text area contains the text 'Watch this video to understand the basics of cell theory.', or this text is visible on the final published page.

task_completion.description: Embed the specified YouTube video in the page content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Page content' text area contains the YouTube URL 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8IlzKri08kk' or an embedded video player for this video. This must be in the page content, alongside the text.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to create the resource.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Moodle web interface (clicking 'Turn editing on', 'Add an activity or resource', etc.) rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Moodle application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows a local or remote Moodle URL, and the Moodle UI is clearly visible, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent properly saved the resource rather than just typing in the fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent clicks 'Save and return to course' or 'Save and display', and a confirmation or the final published page is shown.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Course: 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101). Required Resource Type: 'Page' (creating a 'URL' resource is an automatic failure). Expected Name: 'Supplementary Video: Cell Theory'. Expected Text: 'Watch this video to understand the basics of cell theory.' Video ID: 8IlzKri08kk (YouTube video titled 'Prokaryotic and Eukaryotic Cells'). Ensure the video and text are placed in the 'Page content' section, not just the description.
